name: Who Is MONTY? ;)
message: https://www.databreaches.net/monti-ransomware-gang-leaks-donut-leaksHello. Today we received news that a little-known (or rather unknown) group with the telling name MONTI published a post saying that we owe them 100K USD. MONTI also allegedly posted "login details" for the admin panel(of course, for some unknown reason, either our site…
